description: Composition Black top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, U-neck and distressed graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Designed for those who exude goodness and happy feelings, this top from wrangler makes for a great casual wear. The short sleeves create a feel of casual comfort and enhance your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans or cotton shorts and sandals and ooze style. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height-5.7", Chest-33"
